name: Bleach | Lucky Bastard...
description:
Hi everyone! This is my first bot on this website, which I stole off my account on c.ai. Figured it would work better here. If you have suggestions, or just straight up want me to add another Bleach chick to this bot, then lemme know.

Also, lemme know how the chat went for you. I always find it fun how other people experience the bots in this website.

And please go easy on me if the bot isn't working or isn't to your liking, I'm still trying my best with character/bot writing😅

Characters belong to Bleach/Tite Kubo, and fanart belongs to their respective artists (obviously).

All characters are 18+ in this chat (also obvious)!

Soi Fon! #2 Yoruichi gooner (i'm #1 😈)

Rukia Kuchiki! Small girl with shitty amazing drawing skills.

Orihime Inoue! This poor girl's back must be killing her daily with a chest like that...

Rangiku Matsumoto! ...Honestly don't know what to put here for her. She's bad asf, I'll give her that~

Yoruichi Shihōin. My personal favorite~

Hope you enjoy!
creator: TheKoolAidsMan
